description: English language coaching — auto-correct prompts and summarize sessions.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Intentionally global — hook matchers do not support the content-based filters this plugin needs, so filtering must happen inside the hook script. The Node script at scripts/prompt-coach-hook.mjs skips: (1) slash commands (prompts starting with `/`), (2) prompts entirely inside a triple-backtick fenced code block, (3) prompts under 10 characters, (4) prompts that look like raw code (detected by token shape), (5) prompts matching configured sensitive_patterns. These filters exit 0 immediately so the host sees no systemMessage and no additionalContext.
UserPromptSubmit._acceptable_scope: Content-based filtering is impossible at the hook-config layer on the current hook schema; it must live in the script. This is acceptable because the script's fast path is a handful of regex checks before any API or node import cost.

hooks.command: sh -c 'root=${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; if [ -z "$root" ]; then for dir in "$PWD" "$PWD/plugins/codex-english-buddy"; do if [ -f "$dir/scripts/run-hook.sh" ]; then root=$dir; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then for dir in "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache"/*/codex-english-buddy/*; do if [ -f "$dir/scripts/run-hook.sh" ]; then root=$dir; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "codex-english-buddy: unable to locate plugin root; CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec sh "$root/scripts/run-hook.sh" "$root/scripts/prompt-coach-hook.mjs"'

sh -c 'root=${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; if [ -z "$root" ]; then for dir in "$PWD" "$PWD/plugins/codex-english-buddy"; do if [ -f "$dir/scripts/run-hook.sh" ]; then root=$dir; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then for dir in "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache"/*/codex-english-buddy/*; do if [ -f "$dir/scripts/run-hook.sh" ]; then root=$dir; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$root" ]; then echo "codex-english-buddy: unable to locate plugin root; CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT is not set" >&2; exit 127; fi; exec sh "$root/scripts/run-hook.sh" "$root/scripts/session-end-hook.mjs"'
